entities.name: PIGEONPEA
entities.description: A short-day legume species [Cajanus cajan (L.) Millspaugh] bred for earliness

entities.name: SHORT-DAY SPECIES
entities.description: A plant that requires a short period of light to trigger flowering

entities.name: PHOTO-PERIOD SENSITIVITY
entities.description: The sensitivity of pigeonpea to the length of day/night, restricting its adaptation

entities.name: EARLINESS
entities.description: The characteristic of maturing quickly, specifically in less than 90 days in this context

entities.name: PHOTO-INSENSITIVITY
entities.description: The lack of sensitivity to photo-period, linearly associated with earliness

entities.name: ICRISAT
entities.description: The International Crops Research Institute for the Semi-Arid Tropics, where the germplasm was bred

entities.name: SELECTION OF TRANSGRESSIVE SEGREGANTS
entities.description: The breeding method used to develop the 'super early' germplasm

entities.name: NEW PRODUCTION NICHES
entities.description: New geographical areas where early maturing cultivars can be introduced for cultivation
